statuses.pass: The preregistered gate passed on the declared evidence.
statuses.fail: The preregistered gate failed on the declared evidence.
statuses.inconclusive: Evidence exists but cannot adjudicate the gate.
statuses.not_run: The registered run has not produced evidence yet.
statuses.superseded: A newer evidence record replaces this record; history remains immutable.
statuses.retired: The claim or run was intentionally retired before adjudication.
